processed_videos.title: I BUILT A FULLY AUTOMATIC MANSPLAINER
processed_videos.summary: The video demonstrates building a fully automated "mansplainer" using a portable NVIDIA DGX Spark, which runs a sequence of AI models (Whisper, Mistral Medium, VIVE Voice) to transcribe speech, generate pedantic corrections, and vocalize them. This setup allows for real-time, on-device correction of perceived inaccuracies, showcasing the power of compact, high-performance AI hardware for running complex chained models.

processed_videos.title: TiDAR: Think in Diffusion, Talk in Autoregression (Paper Analysis)
processed_videos.summary: TiDaR proposes a hybrid autoregressive and diffusion language model architecture that leverages idle GPU capacity during LLM inference. This allows it to pre-compute tokens with diffusion, achieving significant speedup while maintaining the exact quality of an autoregressive model.

processed_videos.title: Titans: Learning to Memorize at Test Time (Paper Analysis)
processed_videos.summary: The paper "Titans: Learning to Memorize at Test Time" introduces a model architecture that addresses the context window limitations of transformer models by learning to memorize and carry information across very long sequences of text. This approach allows the model to connect earlier parts of a text to later ones, effectively extending its contextual understanding beyond typical transformer constraints.
